programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A ladies man is being harassed over the phone by a mysterious lonely female stalker with a seductive voice

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A greedy yuppie Wall Street banker tries to apply President Reagans voodoo economics literally - by selling his soul to the devil through a voodoo priestess to become rich and powerful He realizes too late the downside of this deal

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: An escaped convict Marc Alaimo returns home to retrieve the money he hid from a bank robbery and discovers his son is bitter and his wife Sheree North has lost her mind Later a couple Chris Nash Ruth de Sosa illegally adopts a baby but as the little girl Irina Cashen grows her new parents come to the realization that she may be evil

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: In an abandoned hotel Mack meets a happy drunk called Freddy who can create anything he wants out of thin air - even food and money but it all ends up having some critical flaw to it And if Freddy stops drinking His nightmares return

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War -The Somme
programme.desc: The 1916 Somme offensive was one of the largest and bloodiest battles of the First World War 1914-18 The opening day of the attack 1 July 1916 saw the British Army sustain 57000 casualties the bloodiest day in its history

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War - Gallipoli
programme.desc: On 29 October 1914 two former German warships the Ottoman conducted the Black Sea raid in which they bombarded the Russian port of Odessa and sank several shipsthe Ottomans entered the war and began the Caucasus campaign against Russia The British briefly bombarded forts in Gallipoli invaded Mesopotamia and studied the possibility of forcing the Dardanelles

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A prisoner George De La Pena is due for parole after serving time in prison only to be haunted by his past before his release Meanwhile the prison warden John Milford tests an illegal drug for his own personal gain

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A psychologist causes the terrors of a disturbed patient hes treating to haunt him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The death of a model recalls for Nick his own infatuation with a beautiful ballerina one hundred years ago

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A cracked mirror threatens to suck Micki and Ryan into the underworld

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: Fredy 114
programme.desc: Fredy 114

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Troubles flow when Grampa and George think theyve struck oil on plots of land theyve recently agreed to trade to each other

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Granpa causes problems when he questions the way Kate disciplines the younger McCoys

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve some secret plans that are sewn into a dress according to a model

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Thinking that a visiting Personnel Officer has come to appraise Binghamton for a possible promotion and transfer McHale and the 73 Crew put on a show of their very best behavior But when they discover that the real reason for the Officers visit is to appraise McHale for a possible transfer they must quickly become the most incompetent PT Crew in the South Pacific

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton needs help from Chief Urulu and his Tribe to modify the Taratupa airstrip Urulu - Angry over a bad deal with Gruber involving Navy property - Flatly refuses But after some lessons on Democracy from McHale and Parker Urulu changes his mind and drives a hard bargain with Binghamton for the services of his Tribe

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wont rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Pollys campaign for mayor hits a snag when her opponent claims to have discovered that Polly posed for a gentlemens magazine Holowachuk gets his first ticket after going over the speed limit at General Craigs request

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways form a band for entertainment and diversion But Gilligans drumbeats are mistaken by tribes on other islands as a declaration of war

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: At the scene of an accident several people become possessed by a homicidal spirit which each of them preparing to make a demonic sacrifice While Donna helps Mitch investigate she comes in contact with the blood of a dead serial killer which happens to be the cause of the troubles and becomes possessed by the killers spirit out to get anyone around her

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 214
programme.desc: Hercules 214

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the mans body as a vessel in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to test the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have finally learned the identities of the Blackwood team They use it to their advantage by creating doubles framing them for an armed bank robbery where several people were shot dead Malzor impersonates a city police officer and joins in the manhunt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane combines his DNA with that of the deadliest plants he can find he unwittingly creates a monster

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Life gets very interesting for Will Tressa and Alec when Brads psychopathic brother turns up

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.desc: Daisy loses her job at the Boars Nest for asking for a raise Enos suggests she apply to become a deputy with the Hazzard County Sheriffs Department Boss and acting Sheriff Grady Byrd rig the tests but Daisy passes them all She more than proves her worth when she takes on a pair of experienced bank robbers

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mario Rinaldi v. Sergey Kaznovsky

programme.desc: Filip Verlinden v. Ibrahim El Boustati

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Rising Star Ryan Dickson including never seen before interviews and his fights in chronological order.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Two planets one full of people are on a collision course Gillian devises a potion to make the Monster Minds on the deserted planet grow only on one side The unevenly distributed weight will cause the planet to split avoiding a collision

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and all the wizards of the universe gather together to combine their powers in the orb which then receives strength from the night moon Saw Boss has captured the night moon and hopes to capture power for evil doing

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses a reversing machine to rob casinos in Las Vegas Matt calls in the MASK team to stop the heists and return the money

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out
